taxonomy: Utania peninsularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is native to the Indian subcontinent, specifically in the Western Ghats. The classification of Utania peninsularis is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Lamiales, family Acanthaceae, genus Utania, and species U. peninsularis. Utania peninsularis is further divided into two subspecies: U. peninsularis subsp. peninsularis and U. peninsularis subsp. montana. The classification of Utania peninsularis is a part of ongoing botanical research.
